description: Infographic on a dark navy background. The upper half is a photograph of Donald Trump in a dark suit and red tie, smiling and pointing toward the viewer while standing on the field of a sports stadium with a blurred crowd behind him. Overlaid in large white serif type is the headline 'The Great American REVIVAL!' ('The Great American' in italic, 'REVIVAL!' in bold). Below is a white rounded-rectangle data card titled in bold 'Jobs in March Grow Faster than Expected Under President Trump', with the subtitle 'Change in private sector employment, thousands.' The card shows a two-bar chart: a tall red bar labeled '+186k' for 'Actual' and a short dark-blue bar labeled '+65k' for 'Expected', with the note 'CEA analysis of BLS data.' A small DOL seal is centered at the bottom. The tweet text uses the word 'PANICANS' and the phrase 'were wrong'.
notable_text: The Great American REVIVAL! | Jobs in March Grow Faster than Expected Under President Trump | Actual +186k | Expected +65k
